topCandidates.prompt: When a vehicle goes uphill on a mountain road, it should change to a lower gear in a timely, accurate, and rapid manner so as to avoid a situation in which driving at a higher gear can reduce the power of the engine.

topCandidates.prompt: When a vehicle passes a school or a residential area, the driver should observe the signs and markings, go slowly and refrain from honking.
